gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/116)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/116)
text: قَالُوا كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِذَا أَكَلَ لَقَّمَ مَنْ بَيْنَ عَيْنَيْهِ وَ إِذَا شَرِبَ سَقَى مَنْ عَلَى يَمِينِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ali Bin Ibrahim Al Ja’fary, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl,

(It has been narrated) raising it from them<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, whenever he<sup>saww</sup> ate gave to one in front of his<sup>saww</sup> eyes, and when he<sup>saww</sup> drank, quenched the one upon his<sup>saww</sup> right’.
en.sarwar: 17. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ali ibn Ibrahim al-Ja‘fariy from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl in a marfu‘ manner has said, the following: “’A’immah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, have said that the Holy Prophet, when eating would eat from what was in front of (nearest to) him, and when drinking would offer water to one on his right side.’”
